name: Supriya Bhat GS
description: Software developer at Tech Mahindra in Bengaluru. She is the elder sister of Samartha GS and has a background in technology.

name: Jayanth DN
description: Hailing from Chikamagaluru, Jayanth is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about cricket and is actively focusing on clearing the JEE entrance exam. According to Samartha, he is a topper among his peers. He is a close friend of Samartha GS.

name: Praveen
description: Originally from Amruthapura in Chitradurga, Praveen is currently pursuing 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He has a strong passion for big bikes and enjoys being around them. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Abhiram H K Nayak
description: From Tarikere, Abhiram is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about cars and is well-known among his circle as a skilled massage artist. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Akhil Mishra
description: Akhil comes from Hakipiki Camp and is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about games and is associated with a fragrance brand. He is formally called 'Fit Boy' by those around him. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Sooraj Joshi
description: Sooraj hails from Soraba and is currently studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about cricket and has a keen interest in general knowledge. He is famously known for being a dedicated supporter of the RCB cricket team. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Poorna K Bhat
description: From Kandika, Poorna is the son of Vanitha and is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is deeply passionate about Yakshagana, a traditional art form, and is known for his ability to flirt confidently with girls. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Dhunush U
description: Dhunush comes from Tarikere and is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about cricket and performs well in chemistry as a subject. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Chirag Gowda
description: From Koppa, Chirag is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about gaming and has an interest in business. He is formally called 'CG' by his friends. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Aman Kalgod
description: Aman hails from Hosanagara and is currently studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He has exposed himself to trading with passion and dedication. He maintains physical fitness and is formally called 'Trader'. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Dhunush BS
description: From Chitradurga, Dhunush is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is preparing for CA (Chartered Accountancy) for his higher education with smart dedication. He is skilled in karate and is known as a well-mannered person with good general knowledge. He is a friend of Samartha GS.

name: Adithya U
description: Adithya comes from Kanle in Sagar and is studying 2nd PUC at Vikasa Pre-University in Shimoga. He is passionate about video editing and can edit videos without any distortion. He is also skilled in photography. He is a friend of Samartha GS.
